name: Lynn Police
description_short: City of Lynn Police Department is a municipal law enforcement agency, not a financial services company or payday alternative lender.
description_long: Lynn Police is the law enforcement department of the City of Lynn, Massachusetts, a municipal government agency responsible for public safety and crime prevention. The website provided (lynnma.gov) is the official City of Lynn government portal, which includes information about various city departments including the Police Department. This is a government agency, not a financial services provider of any kind. The website content shows only navigation menus, language translation options, and department listings typical of a municipal government website. There is no evidence of any financial services, lending products, credit alternatives, or consumer finance offerings. The categorization as 'payday-alternatives' appears to be a data entry error or misidentification. Lynn Police's actual function is law enforcement and community safety, which falls entirely outside the consumer finance industry. Any attempt to categorize a police department as a financial services provider represents a fundamental misunderstanding of the company's business model and purpose. This profile cannot be accurately completed for financial services purposes because the subject is not a financial services company.
